caption: A man sits in a studio setting, wearing a white long-sleeved shirt, a brown bow tie, glasses, headphones, and a grey wig. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone and is speaking, with his mouth open and gaze directed slightly to the side. The background features a wall adorned with numerous framed photographs and some clothing items. A logo for "BOSS TALK 101 PODCAST" is visible on the left and right sides of the screen. As the sequence progresses, on-screen text appears in the lower center of the frame. Initially, red rectangular bars are present; these are then replaced by the text "WHOLE LOTTA WOOD" and "ALK 101". In the final stages, the text updates to read "WHOLE LOTTA WOOD SH*T" and "BOSS TALK 101". The man's facial expressions and slight head movements shift as he continues talking.
